ogTitle: Onkaparinga Hills vs Oodnadatta: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Onkaparinga Hills and Oodnadatta.
heading: Onkaparinga Hills vs Oodnadatta — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Onkaparinga Hills, South Australia and Oodnadatta, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oodnadatta has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Onkaparinga Hills (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Onkaparinga Hills or Oodnadatta safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Onkaparinga Hills has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Oodnadatta scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Onkaparinga Hills scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Oodnadatta scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Onkaparinga Hills or Oodnadatta?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oodnadatta has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
